text: . The contention made on behalf of the High Court that as rule 56(d) of the Fundamental Rules impinges upon the power of control of the High Court, as vested in it under Art. 235 of the Constitution, it should be declared ultra vires in so far as it confers power on the Governor to compulsorily retire Government servants, who, in the instant cases, are members of the subordinate judicial service, is without any substance whatsoever and is rejected.
